task_description: Iteration 4 review-fix: Fix backtest edge cases and deterministic seed, CLI bugs (missing sector/industry params), Dockerfile security (non-root user), docker-compose modernization, documentation consistency (command count, requirements.txt sync), and add comprehensive tests.

verification.summary: All 136 tests pass (118 existing + 18 new). Tests exercise actual code paths (backtest edge cases, CLI param threading, rank correlation math). Docker build skipped (no daemon), but configuration validated via file assertions.
